sections.paragraph:
καταβοάω fut. 3 sg. καταβοήσεται Dt 24:15; 1 aor. κατεβόησα LXX (Hdt. et al.; OGI 669, 5; 51; PSI 440, 19; 551, 2; 4; 6; LXX; Jos., Bell. 3, 410, Ant. 3, 307) to make a loud outcry, cry out, bring charges, complain Ac 18:13 D.—DELG s.v. βοή.

fut. fut. = fut.

  1. sg. = singular

aor. aor. = aorist

LXX LXX = Septuaginta, ed. ARahlfs, unless otherwise specified—Lists 2, beg.

Hdt. Hdt. = Herodotus, V b.c.—List 5

et al. et al. = et alii (and others)

OGI OGI = Orientis Graeci Inscriptiones Selectae—List 3

PSI PSI = Papiri greci e latini: Pubblicazioni della Società Italiana—List 4

Jos. Jos. = Josephus. This abbr. used when follow by title; I a.d.—Lists 5

D D = Didache, except that in a list of manuscripts or as textual variant D refers to Codex Bezae—List 1

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 514
